name: careerforge-pro-monorepo
description: CareerForge Pro — Full Stack Resume Builder

scripts.star: node -e "console.error('\n  Typo: the command is npm run start (letter t before the r).\n'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.start:backend:memory: cd careerforge-backend && cross-env USE_MONGO_MEMORY_SERVER=true npm run dev
scripts.install:all: cd careerforge-backend && npm install && cd ../careerforge-pro && npm install
